name: broker-full-audit
description: Scrape broker pages (if available), then engineer-audit claims + disciplined user model

steps.text: Broker full audit: regulation scrape snapshot + claim audit + user-model coaching. Not financial advice.

steps.prompt:
Using skills broker-claim-audit and broker-user-model, and knowledge/brokers/ (especially ec-markets-regulation.md and any scrape-*.md), produce:
1) Claim audit of EC Markets regulation/marketing (verdict first)
2) Table claims vs evidence (use scraped FSP/company numbers only as claims to verify)
3) Leverage/licence inconsistencies
4) Disciplined retail USER MODEL checklist
5) Explicit next register checks (FSPR/FMA/ASIC/FSCA/FCA)
Do not invent licence numbers. Not financial advice.

steps.action: Acknowledge audit is not a recommendation to open/fund an account
steps.detail: Human confirms they understand this is claim hygiene only.
